name: Quest Holdings S.A.
summary: Quest Holdings S.A., together with its subsidiaries, engages distribution of information technology and telecommunications products. The company operates in five segments: Information Technology; Information Technology Services; Courier Services; Production of Electric Power from Renewable Sources; and Financial Transactions. It distributes Apple products, and related software and peripherals; operates an online store, you.gr, which provides technology products, consumer electronics, small/large domestic appliances, daily care products, and household and baby care products; and operates Apple products retail store. The company also engages in design, application, and support of integrated systems and technology solutions; and production of electric power from renewable sources. In addition, it provides electronic transactions management solutions; mobility and Internet of Things; cloud; and courier and postal services. The company offers its products and services in Greece, Romania, Cyprus, Belgium, Italy, and Luxembourg. Quest Holdings S.A. was founded in 1981 and is headquartered in Athens, Greece.
